shakshi: Kielum poisoned the player before the final confrontation — his last tactical move
The poisoned state forced the choice between orders — manufactured urgency without full capacity
The player is compromised — the choice under duress, the same mechanism as Nexiott's caravan order
Meditation, medicine, and alchemy sufficient — the player fought off Kielum's poison
Kielum's last tactical move failed — the player circumvented the forced binary
The binary available from sovereignty — the urgency gone, the options unchanged, the pressure absent
Asmoth dead — the man who forgave without forgetting
Cyrus dead — Assassin, present at the night meeting in 0025
Hue dead — Kore's brother, the man who invited the player to camp at the western plateau edge in 0011
The order that inducted the player is gone — the oath sworn in 0023 has no home left
Captain Lanvaki dead — carried the plasma rifle in 0030, held the rear in 0054
Sgt. Akande dead — one of the three Heroes of the Azoth Soldiery
Pvt. Kilesha dead — one of the three Heroes of the Azoth Soldiery
The three Heroes of the Azoth Soldiery dead — the military arm of Nexiott's order without its named leaders
The player from strength found the choice unnecessary — neither order imposed, the binary made negligible
